description: Layer combination weights for the succession probability model. Updated weekly by pipeline/04_train_model.py once sufficient media_history data has accumulated (recommended: 60+ days).
note: Initial weights are hand-tuned from academic literature. Layer 2 (career) is the strongest historical predictor. Layer 4 (network) is high quality but sparse. Layer 3 (media) is noisy but real-time. Weights will be refined by step 4 after sufficient history accumulates.
